topic: Average teen tutoring rate vs minimum wage — why hustles beat first jobs
caption:
The average teen tutor earns $25 an hour. Minimum wage pays less than half that.

Your teen already has skills other families will pay for. They just need someone to show them how to package and sell them.

HustleUp teaches exactly that, step by step, for $19.99 one time.

Give them a head start → hustleup.us

copy.headline: What teens charge for tutoring other students
copy.body: While minimum wage averages $12-15/hr, teen tutors commonly earn $20-30/hr helping peers in math, science, and test prep.
